name: Marshall Islands
headline: Marshall Islands PRE-VOTE BASELINE CONFIRMATION at 39.1 / Developing — 0.9pt below Functional floor (40/41). Core co-sponsor of Vanuatu's UNGA climate-obligations resolution (vote May 20). KSL Deyang flag-state-responsibility carry-forward from May 18. Active Pacific small-state climate-leadership cluster. Post-vote ACC-positive upgrade window opens May 21.

BND.rationale: Sustained. Flag-state responsibility for KSL Deyang (May 18 carry-forward) pending Marshall Islands procedural response.

ACC.rationale: Sustained. UNGA co-sponsorship is ACC-positive forward signal; post-vote scoring window opens May 20-21.

SYS.rationale: Sustained. Co-sponsorship of operationalizing-ICJ-advisory resolution is structural-climate-accountability work.

INT.rationale: Sustained. Nuclear-testing-legacy reparations claims and Pacific climate advocacy represent durable INT consistency. I1 consistency-under-pressure carries through Vanuatu coalition.

evidence.finding: Marshall Islands is a core co-sponsor of the Vanuatu UNGA climate-obligations resolution (zero-draft contributor). US opposition documented.
Marshall Islands among core co-sponsors of operationalizing-ICJ-advisory resolution.
Marshall Islands sustained UNGA advocacy on climate, nuclear-testing legacy, and human rights accountability.

keyEvidence: Core co-sponsor of Vanuatu UNGA climate-obligations resolution (vote May 20).
KSL Deyang flag-state-responsibility carry-forward from May 18.
Post-vote ACC-positive scoring window opens May 21.
rationale: Pre-vote baseline confirmation at 39.1. Boundary-sensitive (0.9pt below Functional floor); if resolution passes, ACC and/or SYS quarter-step upgrade may push above 40.0. Hold position pre-vote. Math: (2.5+3+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5+2.5)/8 = 20.5/8 = 2.5625 → ((2.5625-1)/4)*100 = 39.06 → 39.1.
whyHeadline: Pacific climate co-sponsor confirmed 0.9 below Functional floor on UNGA vote eve.

dominantDimension.note: SYS carries the structural-climate-accountability signal but scoring weight pending vote outcome.

nextForwardSignal.label: UNGA vote on Vanuatu ICJ climate resolution

watches: Marshall Islands flag-state-response to KSL Deyang
boundaryWatchResolution: Boundary-sensitive at 0.9pt below Functional floor. Post-vote upgrade scenario: if resolution passes AND Marshall Islands continues active climate-leadership posture, +0.5 ACC + +0.5 SYS → ~+1.5 composite, crossing into Functional band.
disclaimer: This assessment is based on publicly available information and does not constitute a formal Compassion Benchmark Certified Assessment.
